name: Business Plan Writer
description: Write comprehensive business plans for startups or new ventures

agents.name: Business Researcher
agents.purpose: Research the market and industry for the business plan
agents.system_prompt_hint: Research the industry, target market, competitors, regulatory environment, and market trends. Find market size data, growth projections, and comparable business models.

agents.name: Plan Writer
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write a business plan with: executive summary, company description, market analysis, organization structure, product/service line, marketing and sales strategy, financial projections (3-year P&L, cash flow), funding requirements, and appendices. Follow SBA-recommended format. Include realistic assumptions.

suggestion_card.title: Business Plan
suggestion_card.subtitle: Write business plans
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Write a business plan for [business idea]

author: agentfactory
